tests_pass.evidence: 29/29 unit tests pass. E2E: chromium identity-visibility tests pass. Mobile failures are pre-existing infrastructure issues (not regressions).

implementation_notes: Applied detached visual treatment in GroupManager.tsx: opacity-50, data-detached attribute, click no-op for detached groups. Leave uses destroyGroup() for detached groups (local-only) since leaveGroup() requires MLS self-remove which fails for non-members. Invite form hidden when selected group is detached. Member list remains visible. Two new E2E tests added to identity-visibility.spec.ts.
